note: Per-node hourly mean deviation from the regional SMP (LMP - SMP = loss + congestion, PhP/kWh), from DIPCEF final 5-minute results, derived at archive time because the raw hourly zips are too heavy to commit and the public window rolls. On every day sampled to date the published LMP_CONGESTION column is zero; congestion_php_kwh stays sparse-empty until IEMOP populates it.
